title: Update on #834: force runc only when cgroupsv1
body:
PR 834 broke Fedora gating tests, because "--runtime runc"
doesn't work so well on Rawhide. Let's try to be smarter
about when we add that override.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body: @vrothberg PTAL. If you can offer any insights on what the crun regression is, and/or suggestions for a better conditional to enable the `--runtime` flag, please let me know and I'll be glad to update.

Neat little fix @edsantiago 
LGTM with a nit fix.
